project_area: Waste reduction, reuse, recycling, composting, and outreach programs in K-12 schools
demographic_requirements: Special consideration given to schools located in disadvantaged communities (view map of communities provided).
eligibility_summary: All public and private K-12 schools in New York State are eligible. Applicants must include a goal to increase awareness or minimize waste through waste reduction, reuse, recycling, and/or composting and outreach, and agree to share program information and data with NYSAR3.
